sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khaici manpha vawh un, dawmin lungduai tak.
Khaici manpha vawh un, it gamsungah.
Khaici manpha vawh un, ni akai laitak inah zong,
Khaici manpha vawh un, khuamui na nungah,
Khaici manpha vawh un, phunlo, um lah lo in om un,
Avek pi'n Pasian ap in Amah muang un.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khaici manpha vawh un, kham khaici manpha
Khut te tha zawsak ngei lo in.
Pasian in ni le guah puak ding thunge un.
